name: gondor-ws-test
description: The beacons of Gondor are lit. Pusher-protocol-compatible WebSocket broadcasting on Cloudflare Workers + Durable Objects — a drop-in alternative to Pusher/Reverb for Laravel Echo.

APP_ID.description: Public app identifier used in REST URLs (`/apps/{APP_ID}/events`). Must match `PUSHER_APP_ID` in your Laravel `.env`. Default `gondor-app` — safe to keep or customize.

APP_KEY.description: Public app key sent by clients on the WebSocket handshake (`wss://host/app/{APP_KEY}`). **Ships in your frontend bundle** — not a secret, but pick something non-obvious. Must match `PUSHER_APP_KEY` in Laravel.

APP_SECRET.description: **Secret.** Shared HMAC key used to sign channel subscriptions and the REST API. Must match `PUSHER_APP_SECRET` in Laravel and must be **at least 16 characters**. The server returns 503 until this is set to a non-default value. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.
